{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Underlord dream tablets
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Underlord dream tablets]] provide information on what is required to open [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
